item.title: Blackberry Mobile SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Blackberry Mobile SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Blackberry Mobile SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Sends international text messages. To forward multiple standard messages use Blackberry Mobile SMS Software. Blackberry Mobile SMS Software is capable to broadcast international text messages to multiple mobile users within few mouse click steps without required any internet gateway from PC to cell phone. Blackberry Mobile SMS Software is able to forward thousands number of text messages and notification from laptop to group of mobile phone numbers. Sms sender tool that provides facility to load mobile contact details and numbers from text file which saved in your computer or laptop and even from your mobile phone.

[read more]
item.description:

(Chat & Messenging)

Blackberry Mobile SMS Software is capable to broadcast international text messages to multiple mobile users within few mouse click steps without required any internet gateway from PC to cell phone. Blackberry Mobile SMS Software is able to forward thousands number of text messages and notification from laptop to group of mobile phone numbers. Sms sender tool that provides facility to load mobile contact details and numbers from text file which saved in your computer or laptop and even from your mobile phone.

[read more]

Blackberry Mobile SMS Software is capable to broadcast international text messages to multiple mobile users within few mouse click steps without required any internet gateway from PC to cell phone. Blackberry Mobile SMS Software is able to forward thousands number of text messages and notification from laptop to group of mobile phone numbers. Sms sender tool that provides facility to load mobile contact details and numbers from text file which saved in your computer or laptop and even from your mobile phone.

[read more]

item.title: Online Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Online Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
Online Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Do you want to promote your business products in cost effective manner? Just use Online Bulk SMS Software from www.bulksmsgroup.com that is instant text messaging tool to broadcast large number of notification, alerts, greetings, share market information and business campaign at different worldwide mobile networks without any internet connection. SMS sender program is useful for business users to increase their company revenues and sales by sending advertisements, sales offers, update market information, taking feedback regarding your products, etc to thousands of mobile clients.

[read more]

item.title: Software Barcode Label [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Software Barcode Label [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabeldesign1
item.itunes:summary:
Software Barcode Label
(Office Apps)
Software Barcode Label presents in www.barcodelabeldesign.com that allows user to copy and paste created bar code labels in different types of Windows applications without any hassle. See url https://www.barcodelabeldesign.com for more details.Software Barcode Label generates high resolution bar code pictures.
[read more]

item.title: GSM Mobile Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: GSM Mobile Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
GSM Mobile Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
Now you can send thousands of messages in just single mouse of click via GSM Mobile Messaging software which is freely available on website www.bulksmsgroup.com at very cheap cost. Program is the comprehensive tool for mobile marketing purposes and easily compose text SMS in multiple languages such as English, Chinese, Russian etc for product promotion purposes across worldwide location and selected contact numbers.

[read more]

item.title: PC to Mobile SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: PC to Mobile SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
PC to Mobile SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Freely available PC to Mobile SMS Software. PC to Mobile SMS Software transmit business driven messages. Want to share messages to your friends, family members? Start using PC to Mobile SMS Software which is easily available on website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com at affordable price. Now download PC to Mobile SMS Software from website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com which consists of advance techniques helps to select thousands of contact numbers at same time and delivers bulk number of messages without any broadband connection required. With the help of PC to Mobile SMS Software which is cheaply available on developer’s website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com, you can easily compose and transfer text messages across worldwide location in just limited time without any need of programming skills to apply. Program successfully load contacts names and numbers from excel sheet and skips duplicate entries.

[read more]

Program successfully load contacts names and numbers from excel sheet and skips duplicate entries.

item.title: Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry Phone [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry Phone [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry Phone
(Chat & Messenging)
SMS software to send business advertisement. Bulk SMS sending application compose unlimited interview and events alerts. Just click on website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com to install Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry Phone that is simplest way to send mass number of text messages to multiple mobile users within few mouse click steps. Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry Phone is perfect and convenient mode to communicate with your family members, relatives, colleagues, business clients and more through delivering group text messages and notification worldwide without any internet connection. www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com recommends SMS tool which uses delay delivery feature to maintain load of bulk text messaging and alerts broadcasting.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Software for Android Mobile
(Chat & Messenging)
Are you looking for best, fastest and easily affordable application for sending message from your own pc? Just does a simple mouse click on www.bulksmsgroup.com to download Bulk SMS Software for Android Mobile that supports all models of android cell phone of major manufactures like Nokia, HTC and many other to broadcast SMS in minimal time period.

item.title: SGLauncher [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SGLauncher [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: itzselenux
item.itunes:summary:
SGLauncher
(Utilities)
# SGLauncher
Simple GTK Launcher

## Features:

- [x] Show system menu apps
- [x] Search On Web button
- [x] Run In Terminal button
- [x] Show calc answers
- [x] Show Actions
- [x] have a simple configuration tool
[read more]

- [x] Show calc answers
- [x] Show Actions
- [x] have a simple configuration tool
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SGLauncher
(Utilities)
# SGLauncher
Simple GTK Launcher

## Features:

- [x] Show system menu apps
- [x] Search On Web button
- [x] Run In Terminal button
- [x] Show calc answers
- [x] Show Actions
- [x] have a simple configuration tool
[read more]

item.title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.15
i added some extras into this update
that may not be fully functional just yet
new konsole script added

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
item.description:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.15
i added some extras into this update
that may not be fully functional just yet
new konsole script added

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.15
i added some extras into this update
that may not be fully functional just yet
new konsole script added

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
